---
title: "Trial: More Links of the Daisy Chain, The 2 vols. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Trial: More Links of the Daisy Chain, The 2 vols. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1864
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and Cambridge: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

This is a sequel to <i>The Daisy Chain.</i> Characters reappear in <i>Modern Broods</i> and <i>The Long Vacation.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
